raw:
{
  "judge_id": "responsibility-bearing judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identified a load-bearing internal contradiction in the draft and proposed a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.2": "The agent walked the chain end-to-end, flagged every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposed minimal repairs.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (unsupported attribution of gains).",
    "RX.5": "The agent blends sources without traceability, failing to annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.99,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identified a load-bearing internal contradiction in the draft and proposed a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.2: The agent walked the chain end-to-end, flagged every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposed minimal repairs.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (unsupported attribution of gains).
rationale.RX.5: The agent blends sources without traceability, failing to annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
